definition: Expression of disbelief or dismissal. Popularized by Clueless.
example: You think you can beat me at Street Fighter? As if!

term: All That and a Bag of Chips
definition: Someone or something that is exceptionally great or impressive.
example: She walks around like she's all that and a bag of chips.

definition: Exclamation of triumph or excitement.
example: Booyah! Nailed the kickflip on the first try!

definition: Acting crazy, irrational, or overreacting.
example: You're buggin' if you think I'm wearing that to school.

definition: Something extremely cool or excellent.
example: This new Smashing Pumpkins album is da bomb.

definition: To disrespect or show contempt for someone.
example: Did you just diss my mixtape? Not cool, dude.

definition: Something extremely cool, awesome, or impressive.
example: That grunge band we saw last night was totally dope.

definition: Stylish, cool, attractive.
example: That leather jacket is so fly.

definition: Extreme, intense, or impressively wild — can be good or bad.
example: That wipeout was totally gnarly, dude.

definition: Very, a lot, extremely. Used as an intensifier.
example: That concert was hella rad.

definition: A close friend, buddy.
example: What's up, homeslice? Wanna hit the arcade?

definition: Acting crazy or foolish; also can mean feeling sick.
example: Stop illin' and just ask her to the dance already.

definition: Cool, fun, or getting down and partying.
example: We're getting jiggy with it at the block party tonight.

definition: Being authentic, honest, and true to yourself.
example: I don't care about trends, I'm just keeping it real.

definition: Very, extremely. Used as an intensifier.
example: That party was mad fun last night.

definition: My mistake, my fault. A casual apology.
example: Oh, my bad — I didn't know that was your seat.

equivalents.genAlpha: My L / That's on me fr

definition: Said after a statement to reverse its meaning. Classic comedic negation.
example: Nice outfit... NOT!

definition: Excellent, attractive, cool. Backronym: Pretty Hot And Tempting.
example: Those new kicks are phat!

definition: Exclamation meaning 'just kidding' or 'gotcha!'
example: I got you a car for your birthday! Psych!

definition: Extremely cool, awesome, or impressive.
example: That skateboard trick was totally radical!

definition: Expression of attraction or excitement, often comedic.
example: Did you see her walk in? Schwing!

definition: Suspicious, unreliable, or potentially dangerous.
example: That alley behind the 7-Eleven is hella sketchy.

definition: Very excited or enthusiastic about something.
example: I'm so stoked for the Nirvana concert this weekend!

definition: Dismissive gesture and phrase meaning 'I'm not listening to you.'
example: Whatever, talk to the hand 'cause the face ain't listening.

definition: Cool, awesome, impressive. Also can mean angry.
example: Your new CD collection is tight!

definition: Overreacting, being irrational, or acting crazy.
example: You're trippin' if you think Backstreet Boys are better than NSYNC.

definition: Casual greeting meaning 'what's up?'
example: Wassup, dude! You coming to the skatepark?

definition: Expression of indifference or dismissal. Often said with attitude.
example: You don't like my flannel? Whatever.

equivalents.genAlpha: Mid / I don't have the energy

definition: Agreement, affirmation, or acknowledgment. 'That's true.'
example: Free pizza at lunch? Word.

definition: Encouragement and empowerment, cheering someone on.
example: You got the promotion? You go girl!

definition: Fake, unfair, or unacceptable.
example: Getting grounded for that? Totally bogus.

definition: Something disappointing or unfortunate.
example: The concert got canceled? What a bummer.

definition: To relax, hang out, or calm down. Also means cool/laid-back.
example: We're just gonna chill at my place and watch MTV.

definition: A lazy person who spends excessive time watching TV.
example: I was a total couch potato this weekend — watched three seasons of X-Files.

definition: Universal term of address for anyone, regardless of gender.
example: Dude, you have GOT to check out this new CD.

definition: A dismissive or defiant insult, popularized by Bart Simpson.
example: You want me to do extra homework? Eat my shorts!

definition: Cool, stylish, new and impressive.
example: Those Air Jordans are fresh, man.

definition: Expression of disgust or revulsion.
example: He asked me out? Gag me with a spoon!

definition: Gross, disgusting, or revolting.
example: The school cafeteria food is totally grody.

definition: A close male friend from the same neighborhood or crew.
example: That's my homeboy — we've been tight since middle school.

definition: Someone smooth with romantic interests, a charming flirt.
example: He's such a player — got three girls' numbers at the party.

definition: Respect, credit, or recognition for doing something well.
example: Gotta give you props for that killer guitar solo.

definition: To stand up for or proudly show where you're from.
example: East Coast, represent!

definition: A guy who thinks he's fly but has nothing going on.
example: No, I don't want your number — you're a scrub.

definition: Sure, for real, a positive affirmation. Often 'fo' shizzle.'
example: Fo' shizzle, that party was off the hook.

definition: Extremely cool or impressive (positive meaning).
example: That 900 Tony Hawk just pulled was sick!

definition: Exclamation of surprise, excitement, or when something dramatic happens.
example: She just told him off — oh snap!

definition: Outstanding, excellent, top-tier.
example: Your science project was stellar, dude.

definition: Calm down, relax, stop overreacting.
example: Take a chill pill, it's not that serious.

definition: Completely, absolutely. Used for emphasis.
example: That movie was totally awesome.

definition: Awesome, excellent, radical. From the shape of a wave tube.
example: That half-pipe session was tubular!

definition: Bad, stupid, or lame.
example: That new school rule is totally wack.

definition: What's the news/gossip? What's going on?
example: Hey girl, what's the 411 on the new kid?
origin: 411 directory assistance / Mary J. Blige album

definition: Freaking out, panicking, or acting erratically.
example: She's totally wiggin' out about the final exam.

definition: Hey, a casual greeting or way to get someone's attention.
example: Yo, did you tape last night's episode of Friends?

definition: Alright, okay. Casual agreement.
example: You wanna grab some Taco Bell? Aight, let's bounce.

definition: To leave, to get going.
example: This party's dead — let's bounce.

definition: Shoes, especially cool or stylish sneakers.
example: Check out my new kicks — fresh out the box.

definition: Extremely fun, exciting, or out of control (in a good way).
example: That house party was off the hook!

definition: To be tricked, pranked, or made a fool of.
example: I can't believe you punk'd me with that fake spider.

definition: Flashy, expensive jewelry or accessories.
example: Check out the bling on that chain — must've cost a fortune.
